One day, his father suddenly brings an eight-year-old girl, Jin Yingxin, to the restaurant and then disappears. Meanwhile, tensions rise between Xu Minjing and Cui Shujing when the latter marries Jiang Zhongquan.

programme.title: A Good Supper - EP 2
programme.desc: (Dual Language Chinese and Korean) Zhen Qingxiu knew that Jin Yingxin was not his sister, yet he still decided to take her in and send her to school. Xu Minjing kindly prepared fertility supplements for Cui Shujing, but Cui Shujing secretly discarded them, only to be caught by Xu Minjing.

Fafa flatly rejects an arranged marriage with him, insulting him for his 'goat-like' scent, leaving the hardworking Trisno heartbroken.

But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 126
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Tergila Gila Sama Kamu Core
programme.desc: Rizki (Elryan Carlen) loses his memory and is rescued by Silvi (Larasati Nugroho). Silvi’s brother convinces her to marry Rizki, renaming him 'Dul.' When Rizki’s brother, Beno, finally finds him working as a humble farmer, another accident restores Rizki’s memory-leading him to realize he truly wants to marry Silvi after all.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 178
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cinta Sejati dan Majikan Adalah Maut
programme.desc: Ilen’s (Jennifer Eve) love life feels like a fairy tale-a modern-day Cinderella who has finally found her prince. However, her romantic dream turns into a nightmare when she discovers that her new driver, Mario (Adhitya Alkatiri), is actually Bagas (Andrew Andika), her ex-boyfriend in disguise.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 632
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: TAK ADA ROTAN RINDU MENJADI
programme.desc: Ridwan (Rendy Kjaernett) refuses to join his mother’s rattan business, choosing to work elsewhere. After a fierce argument with a naive village girl named Sumi (Faye Nicole Jones) at a bus terminal, fate intervenes when Sumi saves Ridwan’s mother. Impressed, his mother hires Sumi, forcing a reluctant Ridwan to work alongside the girl he once called a thief.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 127
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Kambing Daliman
programme.desc: he story begins with the success of Baskoro, a former film director who has just been elected as the Regent of Klaten. Daliman, a humble porter at Beringharjo Market, is overjoyed to see Baskoro on TV. Years ago, Daliman worked as an extra for Baskoro and even lent his goat to be slaughtered for a movie scene. Baskoro had promised to pay him back if the film succeeded, but unfortunately, the movie was a total failure. Now that Baskoro is in power, will Daliman get what he’s owed

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 179
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Definisi Mencintai Dalam Bacang
programme.desc: Thoriq (Cinta Brian), a handsome wonton vendor, reunites with his long-lost friend Aliyah (Jennifer Eve), who has returned from Germany with amnesia. It turns out her memory loss was caused by her ex, Beno, and his mistress, Cecil, who conspired to get her out of the way.

programme.title: Pepet Terus Kalau Suka Jangan Kasih Kendor
programme.desc: Naya (Soraya Rasyid) seeks revenge against Jojo’s (Bara Valentino) father for a childhood trauma. She gets close to Jojo as part of her plot, but her plan backfires when she develops genuine feelings for him. Meanwhile, Jojo is completely unaware that their meeting was a calculated move for vengeance.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 179
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Maling Hati Malah Kena Ulti
programme.desc: Fafa (Djihan Ranti) is rude to a driver named Trisno (Ridho Illahi) after an accident. She later discovers Trisno is the man who tends to her mother’s goats. Fafa flatly rejects an arranged marriage with him, insulting him for his 'goat-like' scent, leaving the hardworking Trisno heartbroken.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 633

programme.title: Dosen Ganteng Bikin Hati Adalah Mawut
programme.desc: Kinara (Amanda Salmakhira) is a typical college student with a loyal boyfriend by her side. Her world is shaken when a handsome new lecturer (Mahdy Reza) joins her campus. While Kinara initially feels nothing for him, she is shocked to discover that her parents have already arranged for her to marry the young professor.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 180
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cinta Pertama Belum Kelar
programme.desc: Raisa (Baiti Syaghaf) returns to her hometown to attend her older sister’s engagement party, only to be hit by a devastating realization: the groom-to-be, Raffi (Alex Rio), is her own ex-boyfriend. To maintain family peace, Raisa desperately tries to hide their past, even as her heart is torn apart.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 634
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

While Kinara initially feels nothing for him, she is shocked to discover that her parents have already arranged for her to marry the young professor.

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 17
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Chapalrela - EP 9
programme.desc: Anjang Merah kematian ibu dan terpaksa tinggal dengan ibu tirinya, Mak Jenab dan saudara tirinya Jali Puteh. Anjang Merah sentiasa didera juga ditugaskan menjaga kandang kambing ayahnya, Pak Manap.

programme.title: Cik Bunga Encik Sombong - EP 9
programme.desc: Tidak semena-mena Intan Asnidar yang menghantar bunga menjadi tunangan Harris Isqandar apabila gadis yang sepatutnya menjadi tunangannya melarikan diri. Apakah kesudahannya?

programme.title: Kalau Berani Kampung Stail - EP 8
programme.desc: Setiap minggu Sherry dan ketua kumpulan akan di bawa ke kampung yang berlainan bersama artis jemputan untuk menolong ketua kumpulan memenangi perlawanan mingguan

programme.title: JOZAN - EP 14
programme.desc: Duo pelawak paling popular kini kembali setelah 7 tahun tidak bersama menghiburkan peminat menerusi program bual bicara terbaru yang pasti menghiburkan anda.

programme.title: Jihan Show - EP 6
programme.desc: Tok Wan di hantar untuk duduk bersama cucunya, Amir kerana Tok Wan menghidapi kencing manis dan di arahkan tinggal bersama ahli keluarga untuk mendapat jagaan rapi

programme.title: Bonda Bonding - EP 9
programme.desc: Setiap minggu, saksikan artis kegemaran anda apabila mereka mempunyai pelbagai aktiviti yang mereka suka luangkan bersama ibu mereka yang tersayang. Jangan terlepas detik istimewa bersama mereka!

programme.title: Alang Menanti Malang - EP 12
programme.desc: Sebuah drama untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Skrin Komedia: Tuyul Ke London - EP 3
programme.desc: Drama komedi seram tentang sepasang pencuri bertindak menggunakan seekor tuyul untuk mengembangkan jenayah mereka tapi perancangan mereka membawa mereka bertembung dengan pelbagai hantu yang tak disangka.

programme.title: Destinasi Ke Destinasi - EP 10
programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk golongan semua.

programme.title: Aku Bukan BIMBO - EP 2
programme.desc: Elsuraya percaya Azad adalah punca kematian ibu bapanya dalam satu kemalangan dan membenci lelaki itu yang dalam diam mencintainya. Perkara sebenar disimpan rapi oleh Azad dan sahabat baiknya, Dani Ikram.

programme.title: Sembang Pacak S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: Sebuah drama untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Tapao - EP 10
programme.desc: Kembara mencari makan menyajikan keindahan visual. Tapi bagaimana jika hidangan itu dibungkus? Adakah sama enak di meja restoran? Kena dengan namanya, Tapao mencari jawapan di sebalik persoalan ini.

programme.title: Dahlia - EP 20
programme.desc: Dahlia memiliki segalanya, namun semuanya musnah akibat sikap khianat kawan baiknya sendiri yang ingin merampas semua miliknya termasuk suami, anak & harta.

programme.title: Kennot Brain 2021 - EP 34
programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Gado Gado 2 - EP 7
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan komedi untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 18
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Betul Ke Bohong Sayang - EP 10
programme.desc: Kesinambungan dari program popular "Betul Ke Bohong" yang menyaksikan pasangan-pasangan bersaing untuk mengelak dari dikenakan kejutan elektrik.

programme.title: Chomel
programme.desc: Setelah kematian ibunya, keluarga Mimi berantakan. Satu hari, Mimi terjumpa seekor kucing, Chomel dan membawanya pulang. Kehadiran Chomel menyebabkan berlaku peristiwa yang menyatukan keluarganya semula.

programme.title: Masak Wars - EP 4
programme.desc: Setiap minggu, 5 peserta mewakili negeri masing-masing akan bertanding untuk membuktikan masakan negeri mereka yang terbaik. Dihoskan oleh Keanu Azman.

programme.title: Warung Sepahtu - EP 9
programme.desc: Jom lepak santai sambil sembang dan bergelak tawa bersama Jep, Shuib, Rahim & Pak Ya dalam Warung Sepahtu selain turut menampilkan tetamu undangan yang pasti menghiburkan.

programme.title: Kau Rasa? - EP 8
programme.desc: Rancangan 'prank' yang merakamkan reaksi spontan orang ramai dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.title: Sketso - EP 7
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan sketsa komedi tentang pencegahan kemalangan untuk pekerja di bawa khas oleh Pertubuhan Keselamatan Pekerja Sosial (PERKESO)

programme.title: #havocwarna - EP 21
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan yang menggabungkan sketsa, spontan, prank, zumba dan lain lain lagi

programme.title: Jihan Show - EP 7
programme.desc: Riuh rendah dibuatnya apabila Jihan berkumpul dengan teman-teman. Pelbagai topik jadi perbualan bila semua "girlfriends" bersatu.

programme.title: Kak Lina Ter-Over Take Over - EP 4
programme.desc: Saksikan gelagat Kak Lina Pom Pom yang kecoh dan lucu bersama para tetamu jemputan melakukan cabaran istimewa yang pasti mencuit hati anda sekeluarga.

programme.title: Opera Sabun Boboi - EP 2
programme.desc: Pertunjukan komedi lakaran yang memaparkan kemasyhuran pelawak Afdlin Shauki dan Harun Salim Bachik dari Boboi.

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Live 2019 - EP 4
programme.desc: Sebuah program menarik untuk tontona semua.

programme.title: Kalau Berani Kampung Stail - EP 9
programme.desc: Setiap minggu Sherry dan ketua kumpulan akan di bawa ke kampung yang berlainan bersama artis jemputan untuk menolong ketua kumpulan memenangi perlawanan mingguan

programme.title: Komediri S2 - EP 6
programme.desc: Sebuah rancagan menarik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Romeo Returns - EP 4
programme.desc: Saksikan jejaka idaman Malaya bersatu dalam sebuah program realiti yang bakal mencabar mereka dengan pelbagai aktiviti yang menguji keupayaan fizikal dan mental jejaka terhangat di pasaran ini.

programme.title: Karoot Komedia - EP 9
programme.desc: Karoot Komedia adalah sebuah rancangan komedi muzikal 30 minit yang menggabungkan muzik, lakonan sketsa dengan topik-topik menarik yang akan dilakonkan secara spontan.

programme.title: Ngaroot - EP 2
programme.desc: Sebuah sketsa yang menampilkan finalis MLM 2017 membawakan watak lucu yang bertemakan isu semasa. Selain itu, program ini turut memaparkan nilai murni dan pengajaran yang berguna buat penonton.

programme.title: CTDK-ation - EP 7
programme.desc: Program realiti perjalanan Dato Sri Siti Nurhaliza 'VACATION' adalah program menampilkan keluarga besar Dato Sri Siti Nurhaliza.

programme.title: Alang Menanti Malang - EP 13
programme.desc: Sebuah drama untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Biniku Ninja - EP 7
programme.desc: Azlan berasal dari keluarga susah yang akhirnya berjaya merantau ke UK setelah mendapat tawaran menyambung ijazah dalam aliran seni. Kisah bermula apabila beliau berjumpa dengan seorang gadis

programme.title: Sembang Teh Tarik S2 - EP 6
programme.desc: Sembang Teh Tarik yang dikendalikan Datuk AC Mizal ia merupakan program 'talk show' yang terbaru dan santai sesuai untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Rumah Memori - EP 9
programme.desc: Program ini akan menguji daya ingatan para selebriti popular tanah air sama ada mereka masih ingat akan peristiwa atau kejadian aneh & pelik yang berlaku dalam kehidupan mereka.

programme.title: Stand Up Comedy Otai - EP 3
programme.desc: Masihkah anda ingat akan Pi Mai Pi Mai Tang Tu, Senario, Salih Yaacob, dan ramai lagi lagenda komedi tanah air? Kini mereka kembali di atas satu pentas bagi mengubat kerinduan terhadap mereka.

programme.title: Boss Kira S2 - EP 8
programme.desc: Diterajui oleh Sherry Alhadad, Roy Azman & Haiqal Hairuddin dibantu selebriti jemputan demi merebut hadiah tunai dua kali ganda bernilai RM1 juta dengan beberapa syarat.

programme.title: Gelak Gempak - EP 7
programme.desc: Perjalanan pencarian pelawak "stand up" terunggul di Malaysia bermula bersama Dato’ Afdlin Shauki, Harith Iskander, Nabil and Douglas Lim di kelab-kelab komedi tempatan.

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Live 2021 - EP 1
programme.desc: Sebuah program menarik untuk tontona semua.

programme.title: Lawak Ke Dik? - EP 9
programme.desc: Program untuk kanak-kanak bagi menyuarakan pendapat dan berkongsi buah fikiran mereka secara spontan.

programme.title: Geng Gajet - EP 4
programme.desc: Geng Gajet mengikuti sekumpulan rakan dari pelbagai latar belakang yang menyelesaikan masalah mereka setiap hari menggunakan kemahiran digital & pengekodan mereka.

programme.title: Onyomat Geset Go - EP 7
programme.desc: Rancagan menarik untuk tontonan seisi keluarga.

programme.title: Cakap Melayu Lah! - EP 8
programme.desc: Sebuah sitcom yang berkisarkan tentang Encik Daud, Puan Rozita, Mak Som, Abdul dan beberapa pelajar di sebuah sekolah bahasa di KL.

programme.title: Makan - EP 3
programme.desc: Meneroka masakan yang lain dari yang lain, memberikan tips mudah ketika di dapur dan membawa anda ke restoran-restoran yang terkemuka di sekitar Kuala Lumpur

programme.title: Warna Live: Arena Panggang - EP 3
programme.desc: Siapakah yang paling handal memanggang dan siapakah yang bakal dipanggang?

programme.title: Frust Gila - EP 9
programme.desc: Rancangan permainan penuh cabaran untuk 3 peserta, cabaran di sediakan untuk mendapatkan hanya satu pemenang.

programme.title: Lawak Ke Der Tak Coverline - EP 9
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan bual bicara yang menampilkan pelawak-pelawak terkenal Malaysia dan dihoskan oleh Hans Isaac.

programme.title: Rumah Memori - EP 9
programme.desc: Program ini akan menguji daya ingatan para selebriti popular tanah air sama ada mereka masih ingat akan peristiwa atau kejadian aneh & pelik yang berlaku dalam kehidupan mereka.

programme.title: Fan Fanatik - EP 1
programme.desc: Menampilkan dua pasukan yang terdiri daripada ahli kelab peminat selebriti tempatan bersaing di antara satu sama lain bagi mendapatkan takhta fan fanatik.

programme.title: Rumah No 107 - EP 10
programme.desc: Sebuah program bual bicara santai bersama keluarga Tok K, Joey, Man, Ropie & Bibik Cha. Saksikan telatah lucu mereka bersama tetamu undangan dan cameo yang bakal mengejutkan anda sekeluarga.

programme.title: Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat - EP 2
programme.desc: Dihoskan oleh Dato' AC Mizal, rancangan latah paling kecoh kini kembali dengan musim terbaru. Saksikan kaki latah popular seperti PS Mansur, Eida Moin & Nazia Mustafar menggeletek anda seisi keluarga.

programme.title: Legenda Puteri Qaseh S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: Legenda Puteri Qaseh kembali untuk musim ke-2! Sebagai Permaisuri Kayajaya, dia menghadapi cabaran konspirasi merampas takhta, wabak Achum mengancam nyawa dan dijodohkan dengan Putera Nusaria.

programme.title: Gelap Geli Tak - EP 2
programme.desc: Game show terbaru di hoskan oleh Faizal Ismail. Peserta bersaing antara satu sama lain dalam pelbagai cabaran, tapi muslihatnya mereka ditempatkan dalam persekitaran gelap gelita

programme.title: Prankap Show - EP 8

programme.title: Middle Class Love
programme.desc: A young college boy is frustrated being in middle-class family setup and finds love the ideal way to get out of it. Release Year: 2022 Director: Ratnaa Sinha

programme.title: Karma
programme.desc: To avenge an insult, a terrorist has a jailer's family killed. Determined to avenge the killings, he recruits three death-row prisoners to assist him. Release Year: 1986 Director: Subhash Ghai

programme.title: Raja Ki Aayegi Baarat
programme.desc: Raja rapes Mala and the court orders him to marry her. His family continues to torture Mala and attempts to kill her, but she manages to win over Raja and his family with her good deeds. Release Year: 1997 Director: Ashok Gaikwad

programme.title: Loafer
programme.desc: An unemployed, troubled man is framed for a gangster's murder. He must fight alone to prove his innocence and survive, facing danger, doubt, ruthless enemies, and inner resilience. Release Year: 1996 Director: David Dhawan Awards: 1997 Nominee Filmfare AwardBest Comic ActorShakti Kapoor

programme.title: Shoorveer
programme.desc: Siddharth estranged from his father since childhood, finds love in Sitara. To win her heart and prove his worth he takes on a challenging horse racing championship, hoping to reunite with his family.

programme.title: 7 Hours To Go
programme.desc: Arjun, shattered by his fiancee's death, kidnaps seven people and demands police prove businessman Kabeer Khemlka's guilt in a murder before time runs out to save the hostages. Release Year: 2016 Director: Saurabh Varma

programme.title: FryDay
programme.desc: Rajiv a struggling salesman visits a married man's home to sell water purifiers, but chaos unfolds as secrets, lies, and unexpected twists turn a simple visit into a day of comic confusion. Release Year: 2018 Director: Abhishek Dogra

programme.title: Sahebzaade
programme.desc: While both Raja and Rahul fall in love with Chinar, their mother urges them to unite and fight the man who killed their father. Release Year: 1992 Director: Ajay Kashyap

programme.title: 90 Ml
programme.desc: Devadas, who suffers from fetal alcohol syndrome, must drink a certain amount of alcohol to keep himself alive. However, things take a turn when he falls in love with Suvasana.

programme.title: Kurukshetra
programme.desc: ACP Prithviraj, an honest man, arrests Chief Minister Baburao's son for raping a woman. Consequently, Baburao leaves no stone unturned to get revenge against Prithviraj. Release Year: 2000 Director: Mahesh Manjrekar Awards: 2001 Nominee Filmfare AwardBest Supporting ActorSayaji Shinde

programme.title: Paying Guests
programme.desc: Four unemployed friends find a house but must be married to stay. To keep it, they pretend to be couples-sparking hilarious chaos and confusion in their lives. Release Year: 2009 Director: Paritosh Painter

programme.title: Tera Jadoo Chal Gayaa
programme.desc: To save her job, Pooja's friend tells their employer that she is engaged to Kabir, a known artist. However, this creates a misunderstanding between her and Raj, the man she actually loves. Release Year: 2000 Director: A. Muthu

programme.title: 420 IPC
programme.desc: CA Keswani is arrested for bank fraud and forgery. Keswani hires Birbal, a lawyer, to fight his case, but Birbal realises that there's more to it than meets the eye. Release Year: 2021 Director: Manish Gupta

programme.title: Kuch Kuch Locha Hai
programme.desc: Praveen Patel, a 45-year-old married businessman, is approached by Shanaya, an actress, who wants to move in with him to prepare for a role. So he pretends to be single to impress her. Release Year: 2015 Director: Devang Dholakia

programme.desc: Siddharth estranged from his father since childhood, finds love in Sitara. To win her heart and prove his worth he takes on a challenging horse racing championship, hoping to reunite with his family.

programme.title: Param Sundari
programme.desc: Two hearts collide as a North and South Indian unexpectedly fall for each other. Their diverse backgrounds ignite a comedic and tumultuous love story, brimming with cultural misadventures.

programme.title: Kuttey
programme.desc: One rainy night in the outskirts of Mumbai, three stray gangs unknowingly cross paths on the hunt and it's every man for himself.

programme.title: Bewafai
programme.desc: Asha's jealousy gets the better of her when she finds out that the man she loves, Ashok, is showering attention to Vinny, a woman Asha beats up later, and Renu, a woman who has a cognitive disorder.

programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.desc: Series of short, comedic vignettes where an unlucky Bhojpuri producer Champaklal and his secretary Suzie hilariously navigate chaotic, low-budget filmmaking, trying to outsmart each other.

programme.desc: Series of short, comedic vignettes where an unlucky Bhojpuri producer Champaklal and his secretary Suzie hilariously navigate chaotic, low-budget filmmaking, trying to outsmart each other.

programme.title: Kya Bolti Tu?
programme.desc: A young woman breaks up with her boyfriend when she learns he does not believe in true love, but her next boyfriend is not a perfect match either.

programme.desc: Struggling Mamta finds a corrupt tycoon's phone and risks everything by blackmailing him for a chance at a better life.

programme.desc: Fed up with her mundane existence, a housewife gets to relive the past while attending a school reunion.

programme.title: Shaitaan (2024)
programme.desc: A family outing takes a terrifying turn when an intruder takes over the body of the teenage daughter, putting her at the mercy of increasingly sinister orders.

programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Metro In Dino

programme.desc: Romantic drama with Rajesh Khanna and Sharmila Tagore .The music by R. D. Burman in this movie proved to be one of the best scores of his career, with hits like Raina beeti jaaye.

programme.title: Costao

programme.title: La Clef - C'est Quoi Ton Truc Julie ? - EP 16
programme.desc: Julie Provencher is a mother passionate about education. With her, it's impossible to get bored! In each episode, she gives tips and tricks to parents so they can educate their children while having fun.

programme.title: Partie De Campagne - EP 47
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: Partie De Campagne - EP 48
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: Les Triples - EP 38
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Potobot - EP 19
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: L'aventure Du Monde Des Mondes - EP 29
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Roi Keita - EP 15
programme.desc: The entire empire is on alert: Soundiata Keita's mother has been kidnapped. Abdul, as thirsty for power as ever, heads to the city of the sacred baobab trees.

programme.title: Mission Info
programme.desc: News programme aimed at 7 to 11-year-olds! Each episode, devised for children and their parents, provides insight accessible to younger ones, combined with explanations, immersive reports and expert interviews. An educational quiz also gives children the chance to test their knowledge in a fun way.

programme.title: Terra Artistika - EP 4
programme.desc: Painter and sculptor Yoann Merienne is known for his attention to detail, the intensity of his drawings, and his mastery of light and shadow. His work draws inspiration from virtual imagery, fiction and mythology.

programme.title: Falo - EP 17
programme.desc: A news magazine show, ''Falo'' discusses and analyses current affairs in depth.

programme.title: Objectif Monde L'hebdo
programme.desc: Report, inquiry, investigation ... ''Objectif Monde L'Hebdo'', a television magazine by French-speaking editorialists, takes time to reflect and analyse through the expert insights and opinions provided by specialists. A TV5MONDE programme, jointly produced with RTS, in collaboration with its francophone partners (RTBF, Radio-Canada, France Televisions).

programme.title: Gotha
programme.desc: A general overview of European and world monarchies, through an issue of the moment, a particular focus, an encounter or a trend, plus one right royal question, asked by Ange-Victoria!

programme.title: Le Magazine De La Riviera - EP 88
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: Suisse En Scene
programme.desc: Interview with a key figure from the Swiss cultural scene. An opportunity to look back at their life and career, and the foundations that underpin their work.

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 3
programme.desc: A French artist of Algerian and Tunisian origins, it was the death of her grandmother that triggered her artistic gesture. Johanna Tordjman had to paint in order not to forget. Drawing on photographic archives, she chose to tell, through brushstrokes, the stories of heritage, immigration and the invisible memories of contemporary France.

programme.title: Le Match Dans Le Match - EP 85
programme.desc: She's a major figure in French athletics: world champion, European champion, Olympic medallist, and holder of the European 100m record, sprinter Christine Arron joins Pierre Classen.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Generation F - EP 7
programme.desc: In Paris, Richard Orlinski meets Diane, a high-warp tapestry artist, who has taken the name Merigot Sanzay. The artist revisits this ancestral French craft by giving it a modern touch. Installed in a workshop-boutique, she creates abstract wall works inspired by photographs. The journey continues in Vietnam, in Da Nang, which inspires painter Mathilde Granveau.

programme.title: Hep Taxi ! - EP 19
programme.desc: In town or in the countryside, day or night, Jerome Colin, the presenter-taxi driver leads his prestigious customer on a four-wheel journey conducive to secrets.

programme.title: Sur Le Front - EP 9
programme.desc: The money invested by the French in booklets or life insurance contracts does not sleep. It is invested. But the contributors have no right of scrutiny over the investments made. If the banks promise investments without oil or «sustainable development», the system remains completely opaque. Investigation.

programme.title: Tendance XXI - EP 5
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: Version Francaise - EP 6
programme.desc: A 4,000 square metre domus at the Vesunna Gallo-Roman Museum in Perigueux. Wendy Andreu structures each material with the same interest in creating unique objects. AlainPaul invites himself into a dance dressing room where clothes stretch and float. Jerome Clochard restores mosaics in Brittany.

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion
programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.title: Savourer - EP 21
programme.desc: On the menu: homemade sweets, homemade crackers, homemade mini raspberry pop tarts, homemade fruit rolls.

programme.title: Parlons eco - EP 12
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's new economic news bulletin, presented by Vicky Bogaert. ''Parlons eco'' analyses today's major trends and interviews the men and women who are starting businesses, innovating and imagining the economy of tomorrow.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Christophe Willem En Panorama - EP 1
programme.desc: A fabulous evening orchestrated by Christophe Willem, surrounded by his musicians and a very personal stage decor, for an intimate concert at Olympia based around ''Panorama'', a 6th album acclaimed by both critics and public.

programme.title: Meurtres a Pont-Aven
programme.desc: The bodies of two gallery-owners have been found. Murders that seem to echo the disappearance of an artist twenty years earlier. And it is his daughter, Marion, who heads the case, alongside Antoine. What links the murders? Suspicions begin to grow about the way the first case was handled.

programme.desc: Stay tuned as Deutsche Welle (DW), Germany's international broadcaster presents the country’s news, current affairs and showcases its people's life and mentality.

programme.title: Focus on Europe
programme.desc: Drone attacks cause a drop in tourism - how the wars in the Middle East are affecting Cyprus +++ Sperm donors and their many children - how Europe regulates assisted reproduction

programme.title: Movie - Neeya 2
programme.desc: After losing the love of her life two decades ago, a woman, who has the power to transform into a snake, sets out on a journey to try and reunite with him.

programme.title: Movie - Naanayam
programme.desc: Ravi is an electronics engineer who works in a bank and is in love with Nandini. Farid is a criminal who claims he can prove that Ravi has killed a man and blackmails him into robbing the bank.

programme.title: Movie - A Film By Aravind
programme.desc: Director Aravind and actor Rishi go on a road trip to find inspiration for their next film. However, they turn into real-life characters as a script dictates the events in their lives.

programme.title: Movie - Aadatha Aatemellam
programme.desc: Ashok and Sudha, two orphan siblings, are extremely affectionate towards each other. However, Ashok gets involved in a huge mess due to his drug addiction, and Sudha sets out to change his bad habits.

programme.title: Movie - Mugamoodi

programme.desc: Divya, a casteist girl, dreams of marrying a gangster and falls in love with Saravanan without realising that he is from a different caste.

programme.title: Movie - Raja
programme.desc: Priya confesses her love to Raja but he mistakenly falls for a girl with the same name. Years later, Priya re-enters his life and triggers a series of emotionally complicated situations.

programme.title: Movie - Hero
programme.desc: Shakthi, a young man, helps Mathi, a student, exhibit her invention at an educational fair. However, when they both are falsely accused of a patent violation, he sets out to prove their innocence.

programme.title: Movie - Kutti Puli

programme.title: Movie - Mayakkam Enna

programme.title: Movie - Aarohanam

The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP 37
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: REVIEW - MON 27 APR
programme.desc: Review brings you all the action from Matchweek 34. Friday's game sees Sunderland host Nottingham Forest, Arsenal welcome Newcastle, Liverpool take on Crystal Palace, and Manchester United close out the round against Brentford.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 38
programme.desc: I left here as a boy and I'm definitely coming back as a man. With 25 goals in Aston Villa's promotion-winning Championship season in 2018/19, Tammy Abraham still holds a special place in the hearts of Villa fans. Having risen through the ranks at Chelsea but then moved on by Thomas Tuchel, a determination to succeed saw him win plaudits wherever he played - For Roma and AC Milan in Serie A and lately for Besiktas, but Abraham has unfinished business in the Premier League.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 48
programme.desc: We speak to Dimitar Berbatov, a player whose elegance and composure left a lasting imprint on English football. Focusing on his Premier League years, we follow his rise at Tottenham Hotspur, where his effortless style first captivated fans, through to his trophy-laden spell at Manchester United, where moments of brilliance were often matched by intense scrutiny.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 3
programme.desc: With 481 Premier League appearances and five titles - Michael Carrick is a Premier League icon. Carrick sits down with Premier League Moments to look back over his glittering career - from the West Ham youth academy through to being a key figure in Sir Alex's Ferguson's Manchester United side. In addition to his Premier League career, he also reflects on winning the Champions League, Europa League, the FA Cup as well as his international career.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP 37
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 47
programme.desc: We celebrate the rise of Norwegian striking power in the Premier League, exploring how a golden generation in the late 1990s; featuring pioneers like Ole Gunnar Solskjær and Tore Andre Flo helped shatter stereotypes and establish Norway as an unlikely breeding ground for elite forwards.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 43
programme.desc: We join Willian in Gremio, Brazil, where he is currently continuing his playing career, as he reflects on an incredible journey in the Premier League. Sharing insights from his time at Chelsea and that controversial move across London to Arsenal and then Fulham, Willian opens up about the highs, challenges and defining moments that shaped his career at the top level of English football.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2012/2013 season.

In this episode, he reflects on the moments that defined his Premier League career, from dazzling solo runs to spectacular strikes, that made him a true fan favourite.

programme.desc: Punditry, pressers and predictions ahead of the PL weekend. Our studio team tackle all the major talking points and we hear from the headline acts as the players and the managers have their say ahead of the action.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 25/26 MW35 Leeds United v Burnley
programme.desc: Each Premier League game from the 2025/26 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: PREVIEW - FRI 01 MAY (UPDATED)
programme.desc: We preview Manchester United's blockbuster clash with Liverpool, Arsenal taking on Fulham in a London derby and Manchester City's trip to Everton.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 8
programme.desc: With over 300 appearances for Arsenal, Martin Keown is an iconic figure at the North London club. A member of the Invincibles, Keown was a graduate of the Arsenal academy before moving to Aston Villa and then Everton before returning to Highbury. A three-time Premier League champion, Keown sits down with PL Moments to talk us through his remarkable journey and select his top ten moments from throughout his time in the Premier League.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 5
programme.desc: After 11 years at Burnley, in July 2022 Ben Mee signed for Brentford in West London. In his first season with the Bees, in 2022/23, he helped them secure their best-ever finish in England's top flight. Mee looks back at some of the key games in that historic season.

programme.title: PL Rewind 2025/26 - EP 19
programme.desc: One of the most dramatic survival stories in Premier League history, West Ham stayed up against all odds in the 2006/07 season. Robert Green was between the posts for the Irons, and tells the story of their "Great Escape".

programme.title: The Big Interview 2025/26 - EP 38
programme.desc: I left here as a boy and I’m definitely coming back as a man. With 25 goals in Aston Villa’s promotion-winning Championship season in 2018/19, Tammy Abraham still holds a special place in the hearts of Villa fans. Having risen through the ranks at Chelsea but then moved on by Thomas Tuchel, a determination to succeed saw him win plaudits wherever he played - For Roma and AC Milan in Serie A and lately for Besiktas, but Abraham has unfinished business in the Premier League.

programme.title: PL Stories 2025/26 - EP 48
programme.desc: We speak to Dimitar Berbatov, a player whose elegance and composure left a lasting imprint on English football. Focusing on his Premier League years, we follow his rise at Tottenham Hotspur, where his effortless style first captivated fans, through to his trophy-laden spell at Manchester United, where moments of brilliance were often matched by intense scrutiny.

programme.title: WCCB Tina Rupprecht vs. Eri Matsuda
programme.desc: Ffrom Heidelberg, Germany, a championship tripleheader takes place headlined by Tina Rupprecht of Germany and Eri Matsuda of Japan competing for the WBC and WBO Women's Atomweight World Championships. Also on the card will be undefeated World Champion Sumire Yamanaka, also of Japan, defending the IBF Atomweight World Title against Fabiana Bytyqi. Rounding out the card will a European Heavyweight Title clash featuring Oleksandr Zakhozhyi against Arnold Gjergjaj.Only on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Ricky Hatton vs. Paul Malignaggi
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a battle of fighters who have just one loss to their record, as Ricky Hatton battles Paulie Malignaggi in a light welterweight championship bout that was billed as "Power vs. Precision." Also on the card, future heavyweight champion Tyson Fury battles with Steve Cunningham.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. programme.title: BWF Martial Arts

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best Judo from the Tashkent Grand Prix, we speak with one of Israel's fighters Sagi Muki about the importance of positivity in the face of adversity, and we stop to get to know Dzmitry Minkou, a young talent in the world of Judo.

programme.title: WCCB Dina Thorslund vs. Seren Cetin
programme.desc: WBC & WBO Women's Bantamweight World Champion Dina Thorslund puts her titles and undefeated record on the line in front of her hometown fans at the Royal Arena in Copenhagen, Denmark, taking on top contender and undefeated challenger Seren Cetin of Turkey. Thorslund has held World Championship gold for over five years, including seven defenses of the WBO World Title before adding the WBC Championship in September.

programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 94
programme.desc: The Teletubbies go on a day trip to the Hidey Hup. They take turns on The Tubby Bouncy, The Tubby Slidey and The Tubby Spinny before they go on The Tubby Uppy Downy together.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S4) - EP 8
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'cheese' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Today's episode is full of cheese - yellow cheese, triangle cheese, some sandwich cheese and a squeaky cheese.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 18
programme.desc: It's the Great OKIDO Cake-Off! In his enthusiasm, Messy accidentally ruins everyone's cakes. Will he be able to follow the recipe and bake a cake in time for Gloria's eightieth birthday party?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Preston needs Mojo and Bo to pull his big balloon to a place where he can snap a picture of a rare bird. But his balloon gets loose, and Mojo and Bo need to get Preston back on the ground.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 5
programme.desc: Dad pretends he was born yesterday. Bluey and Bingo have to guide him through his second day on Earth, especially when he discovers food is delicious and steals Lucky's Dad's pie.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 4
programme.desc: Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks, and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 19
programme.desc: From sensible chuckles and nervous giggles to Duggee's infectious laughter, once everyone starts, it's so hard to stop. What were they laughing about again? Anyone remember?

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 18
programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 12
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 30
programme.desc: The team's Pan-American road trip leads them to discover that Glitch is building a road through the Darien Gap. Can they save this important habitat and protect the local sloths?

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 50
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want a pet. To show them how much work they'd be in for, Dad gets to transform his hand into their old friend Shaun, a chaotic, undisciplined Emu with a taste for trouble.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 1
programme.desc: After Dad eats her last chip, Bingo is given three chances to put Mum and Dad in "Dance Mode" as payback. But the others can't resist taking Bingo's turns for her.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 17
programme.desc: Mum won't let Bingo have Pavlova, so the kids find a way by playing a cheeky game of Café in the kitchen. But Dad the chef sets up a competing shop that only serves edamame beans.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 18
programme.desc: When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animal Missions (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: In this episode Andy, Jen & Scout head to Alaska, in America, on a baby animal mission to solve the mystery of fish being buried underground. Along the way, Andy meets a grizzly bear cub setting out on its first fishing trip with its mother to catch salmon.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: It's laundry day in Playtime Towers, and Bella and Lift have washed everyone's socks. All they need to do now is find the matching pairs!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 26
programme.desc: It's time for the annual Animal Obstacle Course Race. The animals need to work together in teams to complete the course.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 25
programme.desc: The Squirrels are rushing around, so Duggee shows them how to take a slower pace.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 24
programme.desc: Happy discovers his wobbly tooth has come out, but he's lost it! He's having a problem remembering where he was when it fell out.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 36
programme.desc: The Go Jetters master the art of mindfulness to save the Giant Buddha of Leshan in China.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 35
programme.desc: When a storm washes up plastic litter onto the Academy beach, the Go Jetters leave Ubercorn, Grandmaster Glitch and the cadets behind and head to the North Pacific Ocean in Jet Pad.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S23) - EP 21
programme.desc: Thomas is working on the Italian Railway, keen to prove to his new friend Gina that he is an expert in all things Italian.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 38
programme.desc: Myrtle declares Stanley Mayor for a day. He soon finds there is a dance class and new barn to open with lots of ribbon cutting, and he even fits in making a Bowling alley.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 37
programme.desc: Stanley helps Hettie with a sleepover at the museum for some of the children. They do a treasure hunt and a night-time picnic, but antics ensue when they clean up after themselves.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals (S1) - EP 22
programme.desc: The funny little animals talk us through all their favourite creatures.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: JoJo searches for a butterfly to complete her nature tick-book. She learns that all butterflies start life as furry little caterpillars.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 47
programme.desc: During a friendly game of neighbourhood cricket, the dads struggle to bowl Rusty out.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 1
programme.desc: Chilli and Bandit transform the old nursery into a new bedroom for Bluey. In the process, Bluey and Bingo amicably divide their belongings, but get absorbed by trading items and swapping notes at bedtime. Ultimately, when Bluey misses her sister, she asks to return to her old room.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 2
programme.desc: Chilli sets up an obstacle course in the backyard, but Bluey is disheartened when Bandit turns it into a race and beats her. After cheating in a rematch, Bluey discovers the importance of training in order to improve her skills.

programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels meet a lion with unfortunate breath.

programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 1

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

programme.title: Supertato (S2) - EP 14

programme.title: Supertato (S2) - EP 16
programme.desc: Evil Pea has trapped Supertato and replaced him with an evil robot lookalike called Robotato.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 1
programme.desc: When the Squirrels find Duggee playing the saxophone, they want to have a go too. Several pots, balloons, tins, tubes and some water later and the Squirrels are making music. And boy, are they LOUD!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 2
programme.desc: When Egg, the cheeky little chick, goes on the run again, Duggee whistles to get him back. Hang on a minute Duggee, what was that noise? A whistle? The squirrels want to learn how to whistle.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 3
programme.desc: It is a lovely day and the squirrels are playing outside. They are playing the shape game. Working out which shape goes where is quite tricky.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 4
programme.desc: Duggee is going to make the squirrels juice from the garden. Whilst picking the fruit, the squirrels meet a little bug, full of woes about being too small.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: Billy and the Sillies introduce a visit to chicken A&E, the Squirrels build a bug house, Norrie has her chance to shine, and the Penguins give facts about what's hot and what's not.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.
